title: Washington DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes
description: Narrative research notes for Washington DDS examiner and supervisor pay: administering agency (DSHS DDDS), the numbered DDS Adjudicator series (Adj 1 = class 956/Range 46, Adj 2 = 955/Range 52, Adj 3 = 954/Range 56, Adj 5 = 953/Range 62 estimated), Step-L monthly/annual figures, WFSE GG 2025-27 CBA terms, OFM salary-schedule source URLs, and documented data gaps. Companion to WA/scheduled-rates.json.

source.publisher: Washington Office of Financial Management (OFM); WA DSHS Division of Disability Determination Services
source.title: WA DDS salary research notes (OFM class specs + WFSE GG 2025-27 CBA)

notes: Authoritative: cites official OFM class specifications and codes (956/955/954/953) mapped to salary ranges, with Step-L monthly figures and the WFSE GG 2025-27 CBA (3% 2025, 2% 2026). Open gaps: DDS Adjudicator 5 (953) range unconfirmed (Range 62 candidate), full A–L step grid not captured in the notes (the sibling JSON has it), supervisory WMS-exclusion inferred.
